title: stelis bracteolenta
intro: Stelis bracteolenta, a flowering orchid species, is native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Stelis bracteolenta are attributed to its ability to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In herbal preparations, Stelis bracteolenta is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
